case_title: BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. BRENT CANNON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
